response.text:

rationale: r0c1's SoC (24%) is only marginally above your 20% floor and your conservative policy forbids sharing when requestor SoC approaches your own minimum threshold; prioritize inbound solicitation and load-shedding prep instead.

user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=conservative, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
